name: calculator
description: Evaluate a mathematical expression and return the numeric result. Use when the user asks to calculate, compute, or evaluate any arithmetic expression. Supports +, -, *, /, ** (power), % (modulo), and parentheses.

expression.description: The arithmetic expression to evaluate, e.g. '(3 + 4) * 2' or '2 ** 10'. Only numbers and operators are allowed — no variable names or function calls.
